stemHtml: Your aircraft is able to conduct RNP APCH. Are you allowed to conduct RNP2?

options.a: Yes, if you can perform an RNP APCH, you can conduct any RNP operation.
options.b: Not necessarily. First, establish the aircraft eligibility.
options.c: Yes, navigation databases are the same for all RNP operations.
options.d: Yes, provided that clearance is obtained from ATC.
